spec_match.rationale: Tracks native mousedown, mouseup, selectionchange, and click timing on a real textarea.

interactive.rationale: Users can click or drag-select in the textarea to populate the event sequence and click-handler comparison.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the event-order visualization described by the feature index.

edge_cases.rationale: Chrome-version detection explains what users should expect on pre-150 and 150+ browsers.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Uses showcase tokens and avoids raw color literals.

summary: The missing ChromeStatus hard-rule reference was added.
